'''kavodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khaf|khaf]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-v-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khaf|khaf]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kavodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kævedeth|kævedeth]] || [[word:kævedej|kævedej]] || [[word:kævedesh|kævedesh]] || [[word:kævede|kævede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kavovodoth|kavovodoth]] || [[word:kavovodoj|kavovodoj]] || [[word:kavovodosh|kavovodosh]] || [[word:kavovodo|kavovodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kavodoth|kavodoth]] || [[word:kavodoj|kavodoj]] || [[word:kavodosh|kavodosh]] || [[word:kavodo|kavodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kavofdoth|kavofdoth]] || [[word:kavofdoj|kavofdoj]] || [[word:kavofdosh|kavofdosh]] || [[word:kavofdof|kavofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kavodotho|kavodotho]] || [[word:kavodojo|kavodojo]] || [[word:kavodosho|kavodosho]] || [[word:kavodoko|kavodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kavodoth|kavodoth]] || [[word:kavodoj|kavodoj]] || [[word:kavodosh|kavodosh]] || [[word:kavodo|kavodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kavodothol|kavodothol]] || [[word:kavodojol|kavodojol]] || [[word:kavodoshol|kavodoshol]] || [[word:kavodokol|kavodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kavodothotho|kavodothotho]] || [[word:kavodojojo|kavodojojo]] || [[word:kavodoshosho|kavodoshosho]] || [[word:kavodoko|kavodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kavodothon|kavodothon]] || [[word:kavodojon|kavodojon]] || [[word:kavodoshon|kavodoshon]] || [[word:kavodokon|kavodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kavodothoro|kavodothoro]] || [[word:kavodojoro|kavodojoro]] || [[word:kavodoshoro|kavodoshoro]] || [[word:kavodokoro|kavodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
